name: Ben Laurie
why_notable: Co-designed Certificate Transparency (RFC 6962, 2013) — the system that made every issued TLS certificate publicly auditable via cryptographic append-only logs. This is the foundational change that made crt.sh and CT-based subdomain enumeration possible. Before CT, a CA could issue rogue certificates silently; after CT, any misissued cert is publicly visible within seconds. Also co-founded the Apache HTTP Server project in 1995 and was a significant OpenSSL contributor.
